personal.name: Víctor Enrique Alcázar López
personal.title: Full Stack & AI Engineer
personal.summary:
Hey! You can take a look at my work at vikepic.com
My name is Víctor and I love technology and creating stuff with it.
I made several videogames and participated in numerous hackathons and game jams during my student life. I love talking about computer stuff and science.
I am also involved in social justice issues, such as women's presence in tech and other issues that i hold very important to me.
I like to work with proactive and open-minded people. I consider myself a very social person: I'm always up for grabbing a coffee and talk with interesting people!

certifications: Introduction to Microsoft Azure Cloud Services
Azure Devops: Introduction to CI/CD with Visual Studio
awards: Smart People with Smart Ideas International Award
Winner in Android category at the First Hackathon organized in Lleida

experience.position: AI Technical Lead & Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Spearheaded an innovative AI initiative for Mercedes-Benz, leading the technical architecture and prototype development. Following external contractor reductions at Mercedes-Benz, transitioned to an internal role at LTS Beratung to restructure and modernize enterprise documentation systems utilizing Large Language Models (LLMs) and advanced prompt engineering.

experience.position: Application Subject Matter Consultant & React Developer
experience.description: Initially hired externally through AV Group before successfully transitioning to an internal role at ServiZurich (the technological branch of Zurich). Worked with the Service Management team alongside the Data Analysis Development team. Delivered operational infrastructure and support to development teams and end-users. Built applications and tools utilizing React, Git, .NET, and Azure.

Developed localized, next-generation immersive experiences for the high-end retail MENA market. Engineered gamified AR/VR test simulations designed to build sophisticated psychological profiles of consumers, integrating early-stage AI concepts to tailor luxury buyer journeys.

Developed and maintained backend services as an external consultant for Mercedes-Benz. Operated in a modern DevOps and microservices environment utilizing Java, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, and the ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Kibana).
Developed web applications built with a .NET, MongoDB, Angular.js, Azure and SQL based stack.

Developed and maintained the core editorial publishing software utilized by sports journalists at Mundo Deportivo (Grupo Godó). Acquired domain knowledge in digital press, high-traffic media architectures, and editorial workflows. Technologies used: Java 7, Apache Velocity, EidosMedia Méthode, Jenkins, Jira, Gitlab.

Summer internship. Expanded existing functionalities of Tiendeo's API using C# and Postman. Added new functions to Analytics service. Created bases for a new PDF-parsing and uploading service. Developed a Visual Studio extension using C#.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (BTech), Engineering Technology, General
